pages.homepage_text:
Birmingham Iv 04 is a IV therapy and cryotherapy clinic in Birmingham, AL. Founded 2016. We're a team of 30.
What we do
- IV hydration therapy
- Whole-body cryotherapy
- Medical weight loss
- Hormone replacement therapy
Get in touch
